title: EventEnvelope
description: Canonical event envelope. Every event emitted by any Enstellar service must conform to this schema. tenant_id is required — no event crosses a tenant boundary.

event_id.description: Globally unique event identifier. Used for idempotency by consumers.

tenant_id.description: Tenant that owns this event. Required. No cross-tenant event propagation.

case_id.description: PA case this event belongs to (null for system events).

correlation_id.description: Spans a logical operation across multiple events and services.

type.description: Dot-separated event type e.g. case.state.transitioned, clock.breached

occurred_at.description: When the event occurred (business time), in UTC.

payload.description: Event-type-specific data. Structure defined per event type in the AsyncAPI catalog.

schema_version.description: Semver of the payload schema e.g. '1.0.0'.
